calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Proposed Distribution Of Estate Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via ZOOM, for Kevin Twomey, Administrator; Nancy Filed, via ZOOM, attorney for former Executor Maryann LaMere.

The court and counsel discuss the history of the estate and why this petition appropriate. Both Ms. Fields and Ms. Ng provide oral testimony and advocacy for the petition. The court notes that this matter does not seem appropriate to attempt to fix an error made by a financial institution. The court advises that it will be taking the matter under submission even though there is no assurance that the financial institution will be satisfied with an order from this court, if granted. The court advises Ms. Ng that the account noted in the proposed order should be more precise. Ms. Ng agrees and reports that she will submit an update proposed order. The court advises Ms. Ng that as a one time courtesy, it will allow her to submit the updated proposed order to the Examiner via email.

The Petition for Order, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Distribution Of Reserves

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Distribution Of Reserves
Off Calendar Jul-06-2021 Continued To Aug-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via ZOOM, for Kevin Twomey, Personal Representative.

Counsel begins by reporting that distributions have been made but that several beneficiaries have died and that her client has been attempting to locate heirs. The court then confirms with counsel that her client has been cooperative lately. Counsel is advised that the court will expect a petition to be filed by the next calling of the matter if it is not resolved by then.

After additional discussion, the Status Hearing is continued to August 24, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Directing Revised Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard PES-94-263489 Estate of Ellen Twomey and PCN-02-282905 Conservatorhsip fo Elizabeth Twomey.

Appearances: Nancy Field for John Twomey. Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The Court granted the Petition for Order Directing Revised Distribution and the Petition for Instructions (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

August 29, 2013: With respect to the Petition for Order Directing Revised Distribution, upon further consideration by the Court the matter is now continued to September 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide points and authorities on the issue of when the interest of the Beneficiaries vest in a life Estate.
